entities.name: POLICY FORMULATION
entities.description: The process of developing policies to transform the economy at the state level.

entities.name: ECONOMY
entities.description: The economic system targeted for transformation through policy.

entities.name: STATE LEVEL
entities.description: The administrative level of governance within India.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the policy formulation and state-level governance are studied.

entities.name: STAKEHOLDERS
entities.description: Groups or individuals who express concerns and interact in the policy-making process.

entities.name: POLICY MAKING
entities.description: The process of creating policies involving interaction between various actors.

entities.name: STATE GOVERNMENT
entities.description: The governing body at the state level where policy making occurs.

entities.name: MINISTERS
entities.description: Political actors involved in the interaction of policy making.

entities.name: CIVIL SERVANTS
entities.description: Administrative actors involved in the interaction of policy making.
